name: opennext-multi-worker
description: Multi-worker OpenNext project with Cloudflare adapter

scripts.dev: turbo run build:cloudflare && ./scripts/merge-assets.sh && wrangler dev -c apps/middleware/wrangler.jsonc -c apps/ssr-worker/wrangler.jsonc -c apps/ssg-worker/wrangler.jsonc --local
scripts.deploy:status: wrangler deployments list --name opennext-middleware && wrangler deployments list --name opennext-ssr && wrangler deployments list --name opennext-ssg
